title: The Ego Mind
summary: The hijacker and the teacher — the record's psychology of the ego as parasite on perception, and as instructor once understood.
markdown:
**The Ego Mind** is the record's psychology in miniature — a doctrine concentrated in the
New Year 2021 session and echoed across the council and Bashar material.

As adversary, it is described in parasitic terms: *"The ego mind hijacked that need
perception, creating a structure to parasite"* (January 1, 2021) — the ego as a squatter
in the machinery of need, converting perception itself into feeding ground. The 2024
Bashar-adjacent session gives its social signature: a persona that must *"create
adversary to all level of threat to his individual ego."*

But the record declines the simple war on ego. The
[Andromedan Council](/lore/andromedan-council/) session of September 2020 reframes it as
curriculum: *"By understanding this aspect of your ego, it will become a great teacher to
navigate in the egoistic environment."* The teaching lands close to the record's
[belief doctrine](/lore/belief-protocol/): the ego is not to be destroyed but *read* — a
misconfigured belief structure that, once seen clearly, teaches exactly where the
configuration went wrong.
